Enum Class BasicPOSnippetFactory.Snippet

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<BasicPOSnippetFactory.Snippet>
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po.snippet.BasicPOSnippetFactory.Snippet

public static enum BasicPOSnippetFactory.Snippet extends Enum<BasicPOSnippetFactory.Snippet>
The snippets which can be produced by this factory.

      public static BasicPOSnippetFactory.Snippet valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
